description: It starts with a simple, yet revolutionary concept: a watch that never needs a battery. citizen Eco-Drive technology harnesses the power of light - from any natural or artificial light source - and converts it into energy which is stored in a permanently rechargeable lithium-ion cell. It recharges continuously in any kind of light to run forever. So choose this watch for the ultimate convenience and to indulge your love for anything high-tech!Case diameter: 37 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundInternational Warranty: 1 yearWarranty in India: 3 years 3 months 3 daysStainless steel round caseSteel strap with a butterfly claspGrey dial with white and metallic handsHas a crystal glass cover to protect the watch faceBranding on the dialScrew to reset timeDate aperture on the dialEco-DriveSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 metres, allowing you to wear it even when showering
